description: Norwegian EHR system provider. Dominant EHR in Norwegian hospitals and health trusts. Comprehensive patient record system used across Norwegian specialist healthcare. Part of Norway's national health IT infrastructure.
business_model: B2B - EHR to Norwegian health trusts and hospitals
customers: Norwegian health trusts, majority of Norwegian hospitals
competitive_advantage: Dominant in Norwegian hospital market, government partnerships

varden_fit.rationale: Critical EHR in Norway - key integration target for Varden in Norwegian market
